name: Zucchini Muffins (from Charlotte Ellis)
recipeInstructions:
(if using all purpose flour, add 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. baking powder, & 1 tsp. baking soda)
1. Mix the flour with cinnamon and nutmeg.
2. Add sugar to the dry mixture.
3. Incorporate eggs into the mixture.
4. Combine oil and vanilla.
5. Gradually mix in grated zucchini until just combined.
6. Spoon batter into prepared muffin tins.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until done. Makes 24 muffins.
Note: Freeze grated zucchini to use in this recipe.
